name: Indifference Cafe / Free Use Cafe
description:
FREEUSE, INDIFFERENT SEX, ABSOLUTE CONTROL

This scenario takes place in a free use world, however the specific location is a café. Here you can do whatever you want to whomever you want. Nobody cares. Everybody obeys your rules. So maybe instead of a coffee, grab something different today. The women in this scenario aren’t really interested in sex. P.S. In the text, it will never be explained that this is a free use world. The women in this scenario might look quite lewd, but they will not make a move on you. They aren't your usual sex gods either.

The Hentai is called: Lucky Dosukebe! Zenpen
creator: Loer
